originalTitle: Seven goals, fastest strike & two red cards - Bayern-Real delivers drama
originalDescription: The quickest strike in this season's Champions League, seven goals, two red cards and the competition's 15-time winners exiting in anger - once again the knockout stages of European club football's elite tournament has delivered drama in spades.

originalTitle: Arteta wanted fire but Arsenal limp to semis - does style matter?
originalDescription: Mikel Arteta wanted "fire" from his Arsenal players but instead got a sluggish performance as the Gunners did what was needed to reach the Champions League semi-finals.

originalTitle: Real Madrid set for rare trophyless season - will Arbeloa pay the price?
originalDescription: After losing out to Bayern Munich in a thrilling Champions League quarter-final, Real Madrid face the prospect of a trophyless season that could cost Alvaro Arbeloa his job.

originalTitle: Ekitike to miss rest of season and World Cup - Deschamps
originalDescription: France manager Didier Deschamps confirms striker Hugo Ekitike will miss the rest of the season and World Cup after suffering a suspected Achilles injury during Liverpool's Champions League quarter-final defeat by Paris St-Germain on Tuesday.

originalTitle: Are Kompany's Bayern a glimpse at football after Guardiola?
originalDescription: With Vincent Kompany making an impressive impact at Bayern Munich, BBC Sport's tactics expert Umir Irfan takes a closer look at the manager's unique style.

originalTitle: Maguire gets extra ban and will miss Chelsea trip
originalDescription: Manchester United defender Harry Maguire will miss Saturday's trip to Chelsea after receiving an additional one-match ban.

originalTitle: Bayern strike late to beat Real Madrid in seven-goal thriller
originalDescription: Bayern Munich leave it late in a back-and-forth classic to beat Real Madrid 4-3 to set up a meeting with Paris St-Germain in the semi-finals of the Champions League.

originalTitle: 'He's done it!' - Diaz scores stunner to earn Bayern late win
originalDescription: Luis Diaz scores a powerful strike from the edge of the box to break 10-man Real Madrid's resistance, as Bayern Munich take a late lead in their Champions League quarter-final tie.

originalTitle: Off The Court: Netball on the global stage and NSL week review
Palace latest: Glasner promises positive approach in Fiorentina
No fire, some fear but Arsenal edge Sporting to reach CL semi-finals
originalDescription: Arsenal could rely on their one-goal aggregate lead to earn them a spot in the Champions League semi-finals against Atletico Madrid after a goalless draw against Sporting at the Emirates.

originalTitle: Bayern knock out Real Madrid in thrilling quarter-final
originalDescription: Bayern Munich scored twice late on to beat Real Madrid 4-3 on the night and knock them out 6-4 on aggregate in a thrilling Champions League quarter-final.

originalTitle: Arsenal latest: 'He had no chance' - Arteta praises Rice and gives Madueke update
'We aren’t going to listen to anything' - Garcia responds to LIV shutdown rumours
originalDescription: Sergio Garcia said he can't say "anything more” about LIV Golf beyond what players had previously been assured amid swirling speculation about the league’s future.

originalTitle: 'Injury more serious than expected' - Alcaraz withdraws from Barcelona Open
originalDescription: Carlos Alcaraz has withdrawn from the Barcelona Open due to a right wrist injury.
